Title: Authoritative repository and external-state reconciliation
Acceptance_Criteria: Sole authority, sibling and backup classifications, branch divergence, S3 scope, pod, volume, services and credential boundaries are recorded without secrets
Notes: Runtime facts are point-in-time and must be refreshed before a runtime claim

Title: Immutable multimodal job and quality contract
Acceptance_Criteria: Every image video audio AV mask and workflow job binds specification hard gates references budgets attempts and rollback before execution
Notes: Compiler derives immutable content ID and fail-closed preflight disposition; runtime lease integration remains pending

Title: RunPod phase lease storage and cost governor
Acceptance_Criteria: ComfyUI generation and review roles are mutually exclusive unless topology-certified; foreign jobs are preserved; /workspace is durable; VRAM overlay ownership and cost ceilings fail closed
Notes: Hash-chained lease and offline fault tests are green; exact-pod queue process OOM crash and recovery campaign remains required

Title: Deterministic image QA and strict visual review
Acceptance_Criteria: Decode geometry color alpha identity anatomy material lighting seams prompt and evidence gates run before product promotion
Notes: qwen2.5vl:32b is the current scoped strict reviewer

Title: Deterministic and semantic sampled-video QA
Acceptance_Criteria: Container decode duration FPS sampled-frame motion flicker temporal identity continuity and strict review gates are replayable

Title: Audio and audiovisual QA authority
Acceptance_Criteria: Peak clipping LUFS silence phase discontinuity ASR alignment speaker semantic event and AV-sync gates are qualified by exact scope
Notes: Deterministic checks may advance independently; Qwen3-Omni and supporting scorers need runtime qualification

Title: Golden-mask proposal refinement and QA system
Acceptance_Criteria: Target binding completeness leakage boundary fine detail alpha topology occlusion overlay and temporal gates produce an immutable mask package
Notes: SAM and matting names are candidates until exact hashes and certificates exist

Title: Fast triage and primary multimodal reviewer tiers
Acceptance_Criteria: Small models never approve product; current 32B strict scope remains fail closed; target 122B primary activates only after measured value and cost proof
Notes: Target primary installs and qualifies sequentially on the existing pod

Title: Independent juror and senior arbitration
Implementation_Target: InternVL and Qwen3.5 sequential role packages
Acceptance_Criteria: Independent disagreement is retained; each exact quantized/offloaded package must pass primary-pod capacity and quality gates before authority
Notes: Optional burst execution is separately budgeted and does not combine VRAM across pods

Title: Autonomous workflow inspection diagnosis and patching
Implementation_Target: workflow inspector and Qwen3-Coder-Next patch gateway
Acceptance_Criteria: Graphs nodes edges models ranges paths resources and outputs validate; typed candidate patches run sandbox and regressions before promotion
Notes: Coding model is proposal-only and has no shell credential Git or promotion authority

Title: Targeted bounded correction improvement and revert
Acceptance_Criteria: At most two attempts per defect four generations and two no-progress cycles; only hard-gate-passing non-regressing improvement is retained

Title: Immutable evidence replay promotion and rollback
Acceptance_Criteria: Every decision binds artifacts models workflows measurements reviews runtime cost attempts and rollback; replay reproduces disposition
Notes: S3 presence and Git push are not acceptance

Title: Calibration disagreement bias and drift control
Acceptance_Criteria: Known-good bad borderline adversarial refusal identity temporal audio mask and workflow fixtures measure misses false positives refusals JSON reliability and repeatability
Notes: Digest prompt runtime or behavior drift suspends affected scope

Title: One-pod capacity migration and dynamic model residency
Implementation_Target: 2x A40 preferred profile with 96GB Blackwell fallback
Acceptance_Criteria: Every role unload reload tensor-parallel quantize and offload transition is receipted; candidate pod passes storage runtime quality cost rollback and failure gates before old pod stops
Notes: Authorized exact create returned no instance; no pod was created; current pod remains authoritative and controller work continues

Title: Deterministic tool gateway and secret isolation
Acceptance_Criteria: No prompt or model output can access secrets shell Git cloud tracker promotion or arbitrary paths; denied actions are evidenced
Notes: Credentials remain outside worker and model contexts

Title: End-to-end autonomous shadow qualification and release
Acceptance_Criteria: All applicable modalities workflow repair regression crash recovery cost security replay and promotion gates pass on held-out shadow jobs before release
Notes: Static package completion is not runtime release
